topStories.title: ‘They’ve lost their Navy, Air Force, radar, leaders are gone,’ Trump claims on Iran military
topStories.description: “Our military is the best…they’re hitting them very hard,” Trump said, noting that Iranian forces have lost their navy, air force, radar, and leaders.

topStories.title: Iran Adviser To Khamenei Calls Trump "Satan Himself", Vows To Destroy Israel
topStories.description: A senior military adviser to Iran's Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei insulted US President Donald Trump and vowed to destroy Israel in remarks to state television on Wednesday, as their countries wage a war...

topStories.title: Reliance remains mum even as Trump announces ‘historic’ $300 billion U.S. refinery deal
topStories.description: The company did not make any announcement neither informed anything to stock exchanges, fuelling speculations on the veracity of U.S. President Trump’s claims

topStories.title: Iran drone attack on US Base in Kuwait left dozens injured with brain trauma and burns: Report
topStories.description: A news report citing sources said that the March 1 strike targeted a tactical operations centre at the Shuaiba port outside Kuwait City, leaving many military personnel seriously hurt.

topStories.title: Iran Military Says Will Hit US, Israeli Economic Targets In Region
topStories.description: Iran's military vowed on Wednesday to launch strikes against US and Israeli economic targets in the region, including banks, after overnight attacks hit an Iranian bank.

topStories.description: According to a stinging barb from Donald Trump, Britons are being led by a Prime Minister who is no Winston Churchill. Soon they will have to cope without the popular wartime leader on their banknotes...

dailyNews.title: Trump attacks Thomas Massie as ‘worst Republican Congressman’, endorses Gallrein in Kentucky primary
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump sharply criticised Thomas Massie and endorsed his primary challenger as tensions grow within the Republican Party ahead of the midterm elections. Massie has opposed several Trump policies, including strikes on Iran and efforts to curb presidential war powers.

dailyNews.title: FBI warns of possible Iranian drone threat to California: Report
dailyNews.description: The alert indicated that Iran could retaliate against American attacks by launching drones along the West Coast.

dailyNews.title: Stryker cyberattack: Iranian group claims responsibility - 'Erased 200,000 systems, extracted 50 terabytes of data'
dailyNews.description: In a statement, Handala referred to the US missile attack on a girls' school in Minab city of Iran, that killed dozens, as one of the reasons for the hacking.

dailyNews.title: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
dailyNews.description: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.

dailyNews.title: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
dailyNews.description: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.

dailyNews.title: Countries agree to record release of emergency oil reserves as prices surge
dailyNews.description: The G7 group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

dailyNews.title: ‘Practically nothing left to target’: Trump says Iran war will end ‘soon’
dailyNews.description: Trump insisted that the military operation had already caused extensive damage to Iranian capabilities.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: IEA to release 400 mn barrels of oil as Middle East war rattles global energy market
dailyNews.description: The International Energy Agency will release 400 million barrels of oil from emergency reserves to stabilise markets disrupted by the US-Israel–Iran war. The move comes as tensions threaten supply through the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil transit corridor.

dailyNews.title: Nicole Kidman breaks silence on life after Keith Urban divorce
dailyNews.description: Three months post-divorce, Nicole Kidman shared how she's prioritizing family while preparing for projects including her return to witch mode for "Practical Magic 2."

dailyNews.title: Star Murdaugh trial witness probes mysterious death of Buster’s former classmate
dailyNews.description: Star witness from Alex Murdaugh trial now investigating Stephen Smith's 2015 death, says someone 'has a good idea who committed this crime' in the case.

dailyNews.title: Six reported Bigfoot sightings in northeast Ohio within four days spark cryptid 'flap' speculation
dailyNews.description: Six reported Bigfoot sightings in northeast Ohio spark cryptid buzz. Alleged encounters near Mantua and Garrettsville described as possible 'flap' event.

dailyNews.title: Ex-Iranian women's soccer star empathizes with national team, breaks down sharing story of father's death
dailyNews.description: Former Iranian women's soccer player Shiva Amini opened up on "The Story" about what the current national team could face from the regime.

dailyNews.title: U.S. at Fault in Strike on School in Iran, Preliminary Inquiry Says
dailyNews.description: Outdated targeting data may have resulted in a mistaken missile strike, according to the ongoing military investigation, which undercuts President Trump’s assertion that Iran could be to blame.

dailyNews.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
dailyNews.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.title: Thune Is in a Vise as Trump and the Far Right Demand a Fight on SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: The majority leader is getting pounded for not pushing hard enough, but he says the votes just aren’t there to circumvent the filibuster.

dailyNews.title: Republicans Concede They Need to Pivot on Immigration Before Midterms
dailyNews.description: In public comments and private meetings at a House G.O.P. retreat, top officials allowed that President Trump’s immigration crackdown had hurt the party and that they needed a course correction on the issue.

dailyNews.title: Strong or Weak? How Trump Picks His Battles.
dailyNews.description: Despite his tough talk, President Trump has consistently made allowances for countries he sees as powerful or dominant.

dailyNews.title: Trump Documents Missing in Epstein Files Highlight DOJ’s Missteps
dailyNews.description: In late July, an F.B.I. agent asked colleagues to get started on a sensitive task relating to Jeffrey Epstein, listing the names of 14 prominent men, with President Trump at the top.

dailyNews.title: Trump and Netanyahu Are No Longer on the Same Page
dailyNews.description: American goals are starting to conflict with Israel’s.

dailyNews.title: Trump vows to end war "soon" as Iran hits ships and threatens banks
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he'll end the war soon, when he wants to, as Iran hits three ships near the Strait of Hormuz and warns U.S.-linked banks will be next.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens legislative blockade over SAVE Act
dailyNews.description: President Trump's obsession with the 2020 election, which he repeatedly and falsely claims was stolen, may stall legislation this year and inject uncertainty into the midterms. CBS News justice correspondent Scott MacFarlane reports.

dailyNews.title: American Petroleum Institute CEO calls Strait of Hormuz crisis "nightmare scenario for world energy"
dailyNews.description: The Strait of Hormuz sees roughly 20% of the world's oil flow through it, and tankers are stalled on both sides of the narrow chokepoint amid suspected Iranian drone attacks, rattling oil markets. Mike Sommers, president and CEO of the American Petroleum Institute, joins "The Takeout" with analysis.

dailyNews.title: Sen. John Fetterman commends U.S. military action in Iran: "What's accomplished is remarkable"
dailyNews.description: Sen. John Fetterman of Pennsylvania says he's the only Democratic voice in the Senate backing President Trump's decision to go to war with Iran. Fetterman joins "The Takeout" to discuss his stance, how he hopes to end the partial government shutdown and more.

dailyNews.title: Rep. Don Bacon says U.S.-Israeli war with Iran is "long overdue," and "had to be done"
dailyNews.description: Republican Rep. Don Bacon of Nebraska is generally supportive of President Trump's war aims, but, like many in the House GOP, is uncertain about how the war will end, the direction of oil prices and future inflation risks. Bacon joins "The Takeout" to discuss how he thinks the conflict is going so far.
